name: Vermicelli in Vodka Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried red peppers in vodka for 24 hours.
2. In a heavy large saucepan, combine the cream, butter, and tomatoes. Simmer until reduced by one-third, about 12 minutes.
3. Cook the vermicelli according to package directions, then drain.
4. Add the cooked pasta to the sauce and boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Discard the red peppers and add the vodka to the pasta.
6. Simmer until the sauce thickens, stirring constantly, about 3 minutes.
7. Mix in the Parmesan cheese and parsley. Serve immediately, passing additional Parmesan and pepper separately.
~End Recipe Export-
